cells.rationale: Contract-shaped change adding a SubscribeOptions flag plus a strict-superset SQL membership invariant and an open-wins readiness merge over closed epics where a wrong abstraction or under-selection propagates to consumers.

Well-specified consumption of the dep task's member across two CLI surfaces following existing block/pill patterns, with a concrete directly-assertable no-double-count invariant rather than a novel or deep one.
